feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Information about SAP BODS and Salesforce API Compatibility
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working on a project for a client who uses ETL SAP Business Object Data Services 4.2 SP14. In this version, we are attempting to import data from Salesforce using the standard Salesforce.com adapter. However, we have discovered that this adapter only supports Salesforce APIs up to version 21.0.

I would like to inquire if upgrading to the latest version, SAP BODS 4.3 SP0, would enable us to use APIs beyond version 30.0. This is crucial for us as the older API versions will be deprecated in Salesforce's '25 release, and they do not allow us to import certain Salesforce objects and fields essential for our project.

Thank you for your assistance. Please let me know if you need any further information.

Best regards,
Edoardo

#SAP BODS 4.2 SP14 #SAP BODS 4.3 SP0

entry.title: SAP Data Services: Behavior confirmation for SQL query submitted for reader in 4.2 vs 4.3
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are in the upgrade process of SAP Data Services from version 4.2 to version 4.3.
We are observing a behavior change in the way SQL query is submitted for the reader in v4.3 and v4.2.

We have a job that will fetch data from 3 tables. When we checked the Query Transform object then we found that one of the tables is neither used in the select clause nor in the where clause.

For ex:
Let us assume we have 3 tables namely A, B and, C. In the data flow, the C table is neither used in the select clause nor the where clause. 

We ran the ETL on v4.2 and v4.3 and below is the observation from the logs:

  1. V4.2 logs: SQL query for the table that is not used is not submitted for the reader
  2. V4.3 logs: SQL query for the table that is not used is submitted for the reader

Question:
Is this an expected behavior of SAP Data Services for the respective version?

Note:
We understand that if the table is not used in the data flow then we should remove it but before doing that we want to understand this is the expected behavior or not.

entry.title: How to change Data service password after the password of default CMS,LCM,Audit database are changed
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to change passwords on SAP Data service (BODS) server after the user passwords of default CMS ,LCM and Audit database are changed . Kindly suggest .

entry.title: Run a job with BODS Designer 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

On BODS 4.2 SP14 Designer I have a problem when I want to run a job.
- If there is no job running on the repository, you can launch a job
- If a job is already running (launched by me or another person), I get the message "the job server you selected is not working" as well as BODI-1241023 when I go to the designer's job server icon.
But in all cases I can run a job via the console.

I couldn't find any relevant information in the log files.

Can anyone help me?

Regards
Laurent

entry.title: Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate WBS element Budget data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to migrate WBS budget (including original budget, supplement, return, transfer, actual, plan data) cost posting from ERP system to S/4HANA. The table involved is RPSCO.

We are looking for a BAPI/ FM/ IDOC to migrate the data. 

Any lead to it would be appreciated.

Thank you so much in advance.

 

SAP Data Services FIN Cost Object Controlling ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Data Migration

entry.title: Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate Secondary cost element postings data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to migrate Secondary cost element or Internal assessment posting happening between cost centers in CO module from ERP system to S/4HANA. The table involved is COSS.

We are looking for a BAPI/ FM/ IDOC to migrate the data. 

Any lead to it would be appreciated.

Thank you so much in advance

SAP Data Services SAP S/4HANA Cloud Data Migration FIN Cost Object Controlling ABAP Development

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA - Data cleansing and duplicate check tools
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Which tools are available for data cleansing & duplicate check in SAP S/4 HANA Data migration. How can I find the license details. It would be helpful if you share your experience on using any of these quality tools?

Regards,

Radhika Mandhana

entry.title: HELP:Bods logic which will generate start date and end date based on week
entry.content:
I am working on bods logic which will generate start date and end date based on week start ( monday) and week end ( sunday).

For example if I am running my job on 05/07/2024 ( sysdate)

Start date: 01/07/2024

End date: 07/07/2024

I am using day_of_week and based on that am adding and subtracting integer to get start and end dates, but I have doubt if logic works for last week of month and number of days in a month.

Can anyone help on this logic please?

#sap dataservices

#sap bods

entry.title: OData expand + CDS/AMDP = bad performance
entry.content:
I have a CDS with multiple associations which uses a table function with AMDP. This is referenced inside an OData service. Everything is pretty basic.

There are some fields that require expanding in order to retrieve the texts. These are simple 0..1 association based only on one field.

Whenever data is retrieved via smart table, the main CDS is queried for each line and each field that is expanded. So, for example, I have 3 fields that require expanding and 8 rows retrieved, that means the main CDS is queried up to 24 + 1 (from the main request) times. As you can imagine, this translates in very poor  performance as the number of rows grow.

The cause is that for each association, the SADL joins it with the main CDS. So if the main CDS looks like this:

 

define new entity ZI_MainCDS
as select from ZI_TableFunction

association [0..1] to I_Plant as _Plant on _Plant = $projection.Plant
{
  key id as Id,
  ...
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Plant'
  plant as Plant,
  _Plant,
  ...
}

 

The SADL first reads from the ZI_MainCDS. Then, it expands for the Plant text and reads from I_Plant but does inner join with ZI_MainCDS as well to ensure the value exists. Unfortunately, this means a second query on ZI_MainCDS that I don't want. This repeats for every association.

Is it possible to prevent joining the main CDS for each association? I know that I could implement GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET and do everything manually but that would take a lot of time and really defeats the purpose of using fiori elements.

entry.title: SAP BODS COMP3 fields
entry.content:
Hello,

In our current project we have a requirement to load COMP3 fields using BODS. COMP3 fields are not properly displayed in .txt files. We are trying to use Cobol copy book format to load the data.

We also tried to convert the .txt file to .cpy file. All fields expect COMP3 is getting loaded correctly. Has any one worked on loaded COMP3 fields using SAP BODS. 

What should be the input file format? We are getting the input file from a external agency. What type of file we should ask them to provide us. Any help on how to load COMP3 fields using BODS will be of great help.

Thanks, Anzari

entry.title: Execute and Stop a job using command
entry.content:

I'm working on executing jobs from unix using commands , i got two files from the SAP Data Services Management Console when exporting execution command.

I would like to have a guide to how to launch/start the jobs and how to stop/terminate th job when needed automatically .

ASAP Please!!

entry.title: only SAP DS without SLT ingest S4 HANA Table and CDS view Delta changes to GCP BigQuery?
entry.content: SAP DS formerly known as BODS has Extract, Transform and Load (ELT) capability. It can extract SAP S4 HANA Table and CDS View data including Delta changes. Why we cannot just use SAP DS to extract and load Table data and CDS View data (With Delta changes) to FCP Bigquery (Non SAP Target). We have tested it is working. But nor seeing any document o blogs to support it. There is one GCP document explain how to export SAP S4 HANA to BigQuery using SAP DS only. But not talks about Delta changes. So wondering is it right approach or not? either way what are the pros and cons?

entry.content:

We wanted to rebuild the integration present in informatica into  SAP CI-DS. Could you please let me know what are the necessary steps we need to consider for this.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Rohit Mohanto

entry.title: Excel to HANA table
entry.content: Need to schedule an excel extraction from a shared site, I need to load the data to SAP HANA. I have heard words such SDI, Data Services and DODS. Which is the more reliable tool to perform this repeated process.

entry.title: Inplace upgrade to SAP Data Services 4.3
entry.content:
We are planning to upgrade SAP DS, so we need your assistance. 

Environment:
==========                                                 

IPS 4.2 SP09 Patch 600
SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 PATCH 18
Database Version: Oracle 19c.
Operating system: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server Release 7.9 (Maipo)
Microsoft SQL Server: DIGITS
IBM DB2: 7.5

  1. Can we go ahead with in-place upgrade Data Services 4.3 SP03 in the current environment? If yes, please suggest your input.
  2. When do we need to upgrade SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 to Data Services? 4.3 SP03: Do we need to download the entire software or any upgrade patch? 
  3. When we need to upgrade IPS 4.2 SP09 to IPS 4.3 SP04, do we need to download the entire software or any upgrade patches?
  4. If possible, please specify the required software to download for the upgrade from SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 to Data Services 4.3 SP03. 
  5. If possible, please share the software download direct link for DS 4.3 SP03.
  6. If possible, please share the software download link for IPS 4.2 SP09 and support patch.
  7. Please suggest that the that the below-specified steps are correct for an upgrade in the in-place environment and give some details for the upgrade.
    1. Upgrade IPS from 4.2 SP09 to 4.3 SP04
    2. Upgrade DS from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03.
    3. Upgrade the repository manager from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03.
    4. Upgrade local from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03
    5. Upgrade finished.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to extend the P1 support of SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 P18
entry.content:
What is Mainstream Support and Priority1 Support  for SAP Data Services?

Since we are reaching end of support for SAP DS 4.2 SP14 PATCH18 by the end of December 2024, can we buy extended Priority 1 support for SAP DS 4.2 SP14 PATCH18? 
or do we need to upgrade to the latest version?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
